queries.question: For each farm, list the animals they use and their count.
queries.sql: select farms.name , animals.type , animals.quantity from Farms_Animals join Animals on Farms_Animals.AnimalID = Animals.AnimalID join Farms on Farms_Animals.FarmID = Farms.FarmID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type ?quantity WHERE {
  ?farms_animals a :Farms_Animals .
  ?animals a :Animals .
  ?farms_animals p:hasAnimals ?animals .
  ?farms a :Farm .
  ?farms_animals p:hasFarm ?farms .
  ?farms p:name ?name .
  ?animals p:type ?type .
  ?animals p:quantity ?quantity .
}

queries.question: Show me the farms and the types of animals they offer.
queries.sql: select farms.name , animals.type from Farms_Animals join Animals on Farms_Animals.AnimalID = Animals.AnimalID join Farms on Farms_Animals.FarmID = Farms.FarmID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?farms_animals a :Farms_Animals .
  ?animals a :Animals .
  ?farms_animals p:hasAnimals ?animals .
  ?farms a :Farm .
  ?farms_animals p:hasFarm ?farms .
  ?farms p:name ?name .
  ?animals p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: What is the common type of animal for all farms?
queries.sql: SELECT Animals.Type  from Farms_Animals join Animals on Farms_Animals.AnimalID = Animals.AnimalID join Farms on Farms_Animals.FarmID = Farms.FarmID   GROUP BY Farms_Animals.AnimalID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Farms_Animals.FarmID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Farms)

queries.question: Show me the animals that are the same on all farms and their count.
queries.sql: SELECT Animals.Type, Animals.Quantity  from Farms_Animals join Animals on Farms_Animals.AnimalID = Animals.AnimalID join Farms on Farms_Animals.FarmID = Farms.FarmID   GROUP BY Farms_Animals.AnimalID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Farms_Animals.FarmID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Farms)

queries.question: What is the quantity of animals all farms have?
queries.sql: SELECT Animals.Quantity  from Farms_Animals join Animals on Farms_Animals.AnimalID = Animals.AnimalID join Farms on Farms_Animals.FarmID = Farms.FarmID   GROUP BY Farms_Animals.AnimalID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Farms_Animals.FarmID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Farms)

  ?farms a :Farm .
  ?farms_animals p:hasFarm ?farms .

  ?animals p:quantity ?quantity .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the animals each farm uses and their count.
What is the type of animal for each farm?
Tell me the quantity of animals each farm has.
